programme.title: Capítulo 159
programme.desc: Vacation planning continues for everyone; In the end, all twelve has Canada as their destination. Gastón is angry when Mia tells him that her and Miguel will be going to dinner with her dad. Madariaga tells Giovanni he'll help him get back into Elite Way School. Celina has lost weight. Valeria tells Franco Mia and Miguel's relationship is a lie; she secretly invites Viviana; Mia punches her.

programme.title: Capítulo 160
programme.desc: Mía reproaches Miguel for dating Viviana again. Gastón catches Mía and Miguel kissing and becomes furious. Valeria and Viviana come up with a plan to expose Mía and Miguel, but it backfires. The group enjoy Canada. Roberta, José, and Lupita run into Pilar. Alma decides to leave Mexico. Mayra, Lupita's aunt, speaks to Nico's mom.

programme.title: Capítulo 161
programme.desc: Mia and Diego, Miguel and Roberta, act as sweethearts to make each other jealous. Franco tries to persuade Alma not to leave Roberta by leaving the country; he lies to Valeria about it. The group is welcomed to the Banff Hotel. Teo surprises José with the help of Lupita and Roberta. Pilar keeps up her conniving ways. José refuses Teo's advances.

programme.title: Capítulo 162
programme.desc: Vico, Celina, and José plan to pair Mia with Miguel and Roberta with Diego. Teo insists that José be his girlfriend. Mayra tells Nico's mom she has three days to tell Nico the truth. Tomás asks Lupita to be a couple. León hires someone to look into Mabel's boyfriend. Renata tells Mendiola she wants Madariaga gone. Miguel's mother comes to the Colucci house; Carlo recognizes her.

programme.title: Capítulo 163
programme.desc: Tomás is pursued by Pilar. Mia and Diego, Roberta and Miguel decide they no longer want to pretend to like each other. Téo kisses José; she slaps him. León finds out Mabel is having an affair with the tennis instructor. Roberta finds out her mom is moving to New York.

programme.title: Capítulo 164
programme.desc: Alma and her daughter are doing a photo session that interrupts, Roberta's father, who forces Alma to put her in an exclusive school. Roberta arrives at "Elite Way School" willing not to be accepted. For her mother there is also a surprise: The director, the director, is an old acquaintance of her. Diego and Tomas go out for a car ride with two girls and suffer a terrible accident.

programme.title: Capítulo 165
programme.desc: Madariaga leaves the class after Renata's accusation. Miguel tells Madariaga the students are with him. Roberta and Mia join forces to stop Alma from leaving. Diego finds a clue about Madariaga. No one wants to work with Pilar. Alma and Franco meet to talk. Lupita discovers Celina's food stash. Madariaga threatens to go to the media if he's unjustly fired.

programme.title: Capítulo 166
programme.desc: Mia and Roberta fight for each of their parent's honor. Roberta and Alma discuss their real issue. Mayra reminds the students why to fight for Madariaga. Mendiola suffers a heart attack after an argument with Madariaga; Renata reveals her relationship with him. Madariaga reveals how his family died. Diego bets Tomás he can get Roberta to fall in love with him. Vico reveals she's interested in Giovanni.

programme.title: Capítulo 167
programme.desc: Roberta tells her Alma she loves her and begs her not to leave. Valeria demands Alma to stay from her "husband", Franco. Téo continues to pursue José. Diego adamantly continues to try to get Roberta. Giovanni sneaks into the school. Celina takes an ad about weight loss pills. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás plan to hook up with girls. Nico receives a letter from Cata telling him about his mother harassing Lupita. Mía kisses Gastón. Diego tries to pay off Simon to lose the race.

programme.title: Capítulo 168
programme.desc: Celina orders the slimming pills; Lupita is worried. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás invite three different girls back to the apartment; they are robbed. Mia and Vico catch Celina with the pills. Madariaga and Lupita comes and rescue the guys; Lupita finds out Tomás lied. Mia gets Miguel on punishment by Gastón. Téo confronts Mia about Miguel. Nico tells his father his true feelings and they are accepted. Miguel vows to destroy Gastón.

programme.title: Abarrotes Don Arturo
programme.desc: Morris tiene la tarea de vender unos chocolates de la escuela y a su familia se les ocurre una idea. Lorena manda a arreglar la máquina de escribir de Frankie.

programme.title: Tapa calefactora
programme.desc: Germán intentará instalar una nueva tapa calefactora en el inodoro de don Hipólito. Mientras que, Vanessa probará un remedio contra las canas.

programme.title: Regalo perfecto
programme.desc: Luisito le da un regalo a Silvita por su cumpleanos, pero ella no lo esperaba. En tanto que, Calaco decide visitar a Rocco en su casa.

programme.title: Tendedero
programme.desc: Magdalena decides to put a clothesline in the middle of the corridors of the building and Luis will look for a way to remove it.

programme.title: Amigos
programme.desc: Silvia agrega a Luis al chat de la guardería y Germán recibe la visita de sus amigos comentaristas de TUDN que transmiten un partido desde la conserjería.

programme.title: Auto nuevo
programme.desc: Luis le compra un auto nuevo a Silvia para que pasee con Luisito Jr. y Morris le tiene una mala noticia a sus padres: no le gusta el rock.

programme.title: Tacos veganos
programme.desc: Virginia y Borre terminan su relacion y no conforme, ella decide iniciar su propio negocio de tacos veganos. Arturo se encuentra un billete de mil pesos.

programme.title: Ropa de paca
programme.desc: Jorjáis decide invertir en un negocio de ropa de paca y descubre que no está solo, tiene competencia. Silvia y Luis buscan sobrevivir al primer día de guardería de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: Silvia party loving
programme.desc: Karla, la sobrina de Silvia, la visita en su casa, y ella finge que tiene una actitud muy cool y se va de parranda con ella. Pedro se siente mal y no puede salir de su cuarto.

programme.title: Nano por un día
programme.desc: La guardería está cerrada y Silvia y Luis no tienen quién cuide a Luisito Jr., por lo que tendrán que elegir entre los vecinos. Hipólito, Pedro y Germán buscan hacer válida la garantía de un celular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Franeleros
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Los vecinos hacen una junta para planear quitarlos sin que haya consecuencias.

programme.title: El reciclaje
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura. Algo muy básico: orgánica e inorgánica, Germán es el encargado de dicha misión.

programme.title: La fiesta de Morris
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: La chica del feis
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima; Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Como en casa
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación; un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Raw Deal
programme.desc: Keith Colburn and Johnathan Hillstrand team up to find the crab hot spots.

programme.title: Settling the Score
programme.desc: The fleet races to catch crab after poor fishing threatens their seasons.

programme.title: Fire at Sea: Part 1
programme.desc: A fire breaks out on the Northwestern hundreds of miles from land.

programme.title: Fire at Sea: Part 2
programme.desc: Sig fights to save his crew when fire breaks out on the Northwestern.

programme.title: Blood and Guts
programme.desc: John Hillstrand gets a scare when his nephew is injured by a crab pot.

programme.title: Life or Death Decision
programme.desc: Zack acts quickly when a rogue wave could spell death for his deckhand.

programme.title: Das Boat - Freshwater Drum with Danielle Prewett and Frank Smethurst
programme.desc: In the Das Boat Season 2 finale, Danielle Prewett and fishing guide Frank Smethurst explore Red Lake, MN.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cold Water: Alaskan Seafood Cooking Special
programme.desc: Join Steve on this Cooking Special as he dives into the best of Alaskan seafood, featuring shrimp, crab, fish, and clams. Learn how to make easy, delicious seafood recipes that showcase the fresh flavors of the sea. Whether you're a seasoned cook or a beginner, Steve's simple steps will help you prepare mouthwatering dishes that capture the essence of Alaskan waters.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bahamas Spearfishing
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve heads down to the Bahamas to spearfish with friends Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell. They explore the clear waters of the North Atlantic to bring home a wide array of fish species, including Mahi Mahi and grouper.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Into the Clouds: Sitka Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella charters a float plane to drop off on a remote lake in Alaskas coastal rainforest for a solo.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Sweetest Meat: Alaskan Black Bear
programme.desc: As summer turns to fall, Steve heads into the backcountry of Alaska's Chugach Range.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Waters Edge: Waterfowl in Alaska
programme.desc: For a waterfowler's dream hunt, Steven Rinella joins his friend, wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell, on a remote trip to some untouched Alaska wetlands in search of ducks and geese. With a spread of decoys and a loyal retriever, they try to get their limit and fill their bellies with willow-spit roasted whole duck.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Rugged Peaks: Alaskan Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Every year, a handful of hunters draw a mountain goat permit to hunt the Mills Creek region of Alaskas Kenai.

programme.title: MeatEater - The New American Food Chain: Wild Pigs
programme.desc: On this trip, Steve travels to the Sacramento Valley in central California in search of a new challenge.

programme.title: MeatEater - Brotherhood, Badlands, and Pack Llamas: Montana Mule Deer
programme.desc: With a trio of cantankerous, spit-hurling pack llamas, Steven heads out.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Roughest Country: Texas Aoudad Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountainous desert backcountry of west Texas after Barbary sheep, or Aoudad. These introduced sheep from North Africa are hard to find and harder to hunt. Challenged by the harsh environment, rugged terrain, and elusive sheep, Steve finds this hunt to be one of the most difficult he has ever undertaken.

programme.title: MeatEater - Canyon Bottoms and Cookouts: Texas Javelina
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes to the canyons of the West Texas desert in search of javelina. In this broken, rocky terrain finding these unique critters isn't easy and getting a clear shot on a skunk pig with a bow is a whole other story. But Steve is inspired by the evidence of he finds of ancient hunters that used the area to prepare a meal that honors both the animal and our hunting ancestors.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Bucks and Small Game: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to Wisconsin to spend a few days on his buddys historical family farm to hunt small game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Fair Chase: Arizona Mountain Lion
programme.desc: In the harsh desert Southwest, Steven Rinella has come to learn the truth about tracking a mountain lions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Crossing Borders: Mexican Bison
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountains of the Sonora Desert on a true, wild, free-ranging bison hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Strange Hunt in a Strange Land: New Zealand Red Stag
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is on New Zealand's South Island for a do-it-yourself, free-range hunt for the majestic red stag. But first, he needs to secure some camp meat in the form of wild lamb. Battling weather and wary game in mountainous terrain, he uses his spot-and-stalk hunting skills to discover Kiwi red stags are a trophy worthy of the wall and the cook pot.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bush Pig: New Zealand Wild Boar
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and local pig hunting expert, Darren Moore, spend a wild, action-packed day tracking down Captain Cook boars in the thick New Zealand bush. Their tools for the job include two tough little pig dogs, a knife, and some real grit. Wild pigs are dangerous critters and this is as visceral as a hunt gets. Along the way, Steve learns a new technique for field-prepping whole hogs.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: The Might've Before Christmas
programme.desc: While Vanessa and the Gable family gather around the Christmas tree, Vanessa and Kevin reminisce about their first patrol together.

programme.title: Fight Or Flight
programme.desc: On a flight for a security job, Vanessa tells a flight attendant that she and Kevin are newly married in order to get bumped up to first class, but her fib creates a lot of extra baggage when Kevin meets Lisa and the two hit it off.

programme.title: 40 Under 40
programme.desc: When Vanessa (Leah Remini) cuts him out of a magazine article about up-and-coming Long Island business owners, Kevin (Kevin James) discovers she lied about her age in order to be included.

programme.title: Monkey Fist Insecurity
programme.desc: After Kevin and Vanessa nail a pitch for a new job for their security company, Monkey Fist, they run into Frank, the owner of a rival company who is determined to put them out of business by pitting Kevin and Vanessa against each other.

programme.title: Kevin Can Date
programme.desc: Vanessa encourages Kevin to ask out a client who shows interest in him.

programme.title: Wingmen
programme.desc: After Kevin and Vanessa witness Kyle's success using a dating app that requires a close friend to choose one's perfect match, they agree to be each other's wingman and try their hand at matchmaking.

programme.title: The Whole Enchilada
programme.desc: After convincing Kevin to break things off with his neighbor, Wendy, who had reeled him in with her delicious meals, Vanessa feels compelled to cook for him despite being culinarily challenged.

programme.title: Delivery Guy
programme.desc: Vanessa convinces Kevin to go on a TV talk show with the "baby boy" he helped deliver years ago as a cop, but her plan to promote Monkey Fist backfires when Kevin runs into his arch-nemesis, Frank Munson, at the appearance.

programme.title: The Smoking Bun
programme.desc: Kevin and Vanessa devise a plan to save Enzo's restaurant after learning the new owner plans to knock it down; the owner makes them a lucrative job offer, which puts the future of the restaurant in peril.

programme.title: Brew Haha
programme.desc: Kevin offers to help Kendra and Chale buy Enzo's, but they soon realize that the partnership won't work when Kevin's idea of a silent partner is not so silent. As the tension among them escalates, Kendra and Chale find peace at Vanessa's apartment.

programme.title: A Band Done
programme.desc: Ignoring Vanessa’s (Leah Remini) warnings, Kevin (Kevin James) reunites with his old band for a show at Enzo’s.

programme.title: Phat Monkey
programme.desc: When Monkey Fist lands Alviti's big account to provide security for his parking garages, Kevin inadvertently derails Rootger's efforts to study for his security guard test and puts the new job in jeopardy, much to Vanessa's dismay. Also, Kendra and Chale try to persuade an investor to help finance their brew pub idea.

programme.title: Forty Seven Candles
programme.desc: Vanessa thinks she's friendless when none of her pals are available to go to dinner with her on her birthday. Feeling lonely while waiting for Kevin to pick her up for what she thinks is just a dinner for two, Vanessa gets tipsy with Kyle, and the two share a flirtatious moment.

programme.title: Cooking Up A Storm
programme.desc: After Kevin insists he can handle cooking a full Thanksgiving dinner for Vanessa and his family, he realizes he's in over his head and secretly asks his flirtatious neighbor, Wendy (Florencia Lozano), for help.

programme.desc: After Rootger (Bas Rutten) is accidentally injured at work, Kevin (Kevin James) and Vanessa (Leah Remini) worried about being sued.

programme.title: Oliver's Jaded Past
programme.desc: For a lawyer, Oliver should be more careful about what he signs. Lisa reminds him that two years ago Oliver made her a promise to take her back to New York for a two-week vacation. And she has it in writing� on the bottom of the kitchen drawer.

programme.title: The Hungarian Curse
programme.desc: It's hard to know who has a curse over Oliver, but he sure has his hands full with Lisa and her fellow Hungarian Lazlo Broslav. Lazlo appears with a letter claiming he once saved the life of Lisa's uncle, and now her family must repay the debt.

programme.title: The Rutabaga Story
programme.desc: There's a problem in Hooterville: no farmer seems able to grow a cash crop on account of the quality of the soil. But as it turns out from Oliver's (Eddie Albert) soil and mineral research, the oft misunderstood rutabaga is an ideal choice.

programme.title: A Star Named Arnold Is Born (Part 1)
programme.desc: Green Acres goes Hollywood in this first installment of a two-part season finale. When Arnold the pig appears in a play at the Hooterville Theater, Lisa (Eva Gabor) arranges for an old friend to give Arnold a chance on the big screen.

programme.title: A Star Named Arnold Is Born (Part 2)
programme.desc: It's a swine-sational third season finale for Green Acres, as Oliver and Lisa chaperone Arnold, the Ziffel's talented pig, to Hollywood for his big screen test. There's only one problem, Lisa failed to mention that Arnold is not your normal actor.

programme.title: Guess Who's Not Going To The Luau
programme.desc: Hooterville is abuzz as the townsfolk enter a contest sponsored by Peterson's Poi Juice, with a trip to Hawaii as the top prize. But no one expects the winner to be Arnold, the Ziffels' talented pig. Maybe a pig might fly after all, to the islands!

programme.title: The Rummage Sale
programme.desc: A charity rummage sale asks for donated clothing. Being among the wealthier residents of Hooterville, the organizers look to the Douglases. It isn't long before Oliver has to stop Lisa from giving away his entire wardrobe!

programme.title: Eb's Romance
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Eb is quickly engaged to Loreli Appleby, whom he has only known for a day. Eb tries to impress Loreli's father, a farmer, but in typical fashion, he accidentally ruins his future father-in-law's cabbage crop.

programme.title: Hail To The Fire Chief
programme.desc: When Fire Chief Joe Carson is looking for a way to go to Miami, he hires Oliver as his assistant, hoping Oliver will pay for the trip. The plan backfires, no pun intended, when Oliver starts pointing out what a poor job the chief has been doing.

programme.title: The Candidate
programme.desc: The highways in Hooterville are in dire need of repair. Oliver is fed up and believes he can make a difference by complaining to his state representative, Ben Hanks. But Hanks' popularity proves greater than his sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Handy Lessons
programme.desc: Lisa feels like she should be contributing more and wants to start working in Oliver's construction business. Lisa is like a fish out of water as she arrives to the Monroes' workshop in overalls and causes one problem after another.

programme.title: A Husband For Eleanor
programme.desc: Lisa plays bovine matchmaker when Oliver and Lisa decide it is time for their female cow, Eleanor, to start providing milk for the farm. Oliver makes arrangements for Eleanor to mooooove in with the neighbor's bull, but Lisa has other ideas.

programme.title: Old Mail Day
programme.desc: The townsfolk look forward to "Old Mail Day", when once a year undelivered mail is handed out. The delayed mail includes a letter all the way from 1917! Oliver is upset by the poor service, but his complaints land with more impact than he intended.

programme.title: The Agricultural Student
programme.desc: When word spreads that an agricultural student is coming to Hooterville to study with county agent Hank Kimball, no one seems to be interested. However, things change when the folks discover that the student is an attractive blonde.

programme.title: How Hooterville Was Floundered
programme.desc: This episode tells the unusual tale of Hooterville's founding. As the town prepares for its centennial, Oliver announces a reenactment of the town's origins and casts himself and Lisa in the roles of Horace and Doris Hooter.

programme.title: The Blue Feather
programme.desc: When a blue feather arrives in the mail for Lisa, her Hungarian roots tell her that trouble is brewing. The feather is a symbol of malfortune to come, and she suspects it was sent by Hungarian gypsies, a warning that they are out to get her.

programme.title: Everywhere A Chick Chick
programme.desc: Don't count chickens before they hatch! Oliver thinks he's laid a gold egg of an idea when he decides to dive beak first into the business of raising chickens. Lisa, on the other hand, sees little difference between raising chickens and children.

programme.title: The Addams Family Tree
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: Morticia Joins The Ladies League
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where he is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: Halloween With The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: Green Eyed Gomez
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: Wednesday Leaves Home
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The V.I.P.'s
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: Morticia, The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: Lurch Learns To Dance
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion, after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: Art And The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets A Beatnik
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The Undercover Man
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: Mother Lurch Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Illness
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she an Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family Splurges
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: Cousin Itt Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family In Court
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: Alpha Pact

programme.title: Lunar Ellipse
programme.desc: In the mid-season finale, under Deaton's advice, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends use an ancient but dangerous ritual to help them both save the lives of the people they love and stop Deucalion (Gideon Emery) from achieving his sinister goal.

programme.title: Anchors
programme.desc: Weeks after saving the lives of their parents, Scott, Stiles and Allison suffer strange side effects from their ritual sacrifice. At the same time, the newly enlightened Sheriff Stilinski scours through old cases, looking for supernatural causes.

programme.title: More Bad Than Good
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends race to figure out how to catch the Werecoyote Malia before it's hunted down and killed by her father. Meanwhile, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Peter (Ian Bohen) are broken out of captivity by an unlikely ally.

programme.title: Galvanize
programme.desc: On the night before Halloween, Mischief Night, a convicted murderer brought to Beacon Hills Hospital for surgery escapes, forcing Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends to step in to help when his unexpected target becomes clear.

programme.title: Illuminated
programme.desc: With Beacon Hills under curfew due to the power outage, the teens decide to throw a black light Halloween party while Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to get Kira (Arden Cho) to trust him in the midst of an attack by a strange new threat.

programme.title: Silverfinger
programme.desc: Scott's friends pledge to protect him against an increasingly hostile enemy, while Argent, Isaac and Allison search the past for answers to the shadow creatures. At the same time, Stiles, fearing he is going insane, reaches out to Melissa for help.

programme.title: Riddled
programme.desc: After suffering from hallucinations for some time, Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) mysteriously disappears one night and it's up to Scott (Tyler Posey) and the gang to figure out whether he has been kidnapped…and if the Oni had anything to do with it.

programme.title: Letharia Vulpina
programme.desc: Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) mysteriously reappears, but is he himself? Meanwhile, Scott (Tyler Posey) must prevent a disaster and Lydia (Holland Roden) and Allison (Crystal Reed) seek help from an unlikely source...Peter Hale (Ian Bohen).

programme.title: Echo House
programme.desc: Stiles checks himself into a mental hospital named Echo House where he believes he will be safe from the Nogitsune. Will he be as far away from it as he thinks or closer than ever? Meanwhile Scott, Allison and Lydia look for a cure for him.

programme.title: The Fox And The Wolf
programme.desc: While Allison, Derek, Chris and Sheriff Stilinski try to track down Nogitsune, Kira's mother tells the story of the Nogitsune she came to know. Meanwhile, the Nogitsune has taken complete control of Stiles and manages to stay one step ahead.

programme.title: Inconstant Moon
programme.desc: When a lonely physics professor Stanley Hurst (Michael Gross) realizes the sun is going to burn out, he knows that he and humanity have only a few hours to live. In that time, Stan resolves to make up for lost years.

programme.title: From Within
programme.desc: Howie (Neil Patrick Harris), a boy with intellectual disabilities, is the last unaffected person in a town overrun by a strange, parasitic madness. On his own for the first time, Howie has only himself to rely upon if he wants to save his sister!

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: After a friend's betrayal cost him his Army career, Lee Taylor (Costas Mandylor) helps a self-styled militia Major hijack an Army shipment. Expecting missiles, they find a mysterious cargo and a lone Army Guard who warns of its deadly capability.

programme.title: Afterlife
programme.desc: Convicted of a murder he didn't commit, Linden Stiles can either accept execution or become the subject of a military experiment. Choosing to live, he finds himself slowly dehumanized by the alien DNA that has been injected into him.

programme.title: The Deprogrammers
programme.desc: With Earth under alien rule, humanity has been programmed into slavery. A band of rebels kidnap Evan (Erich Anderson), one of the alien leader's slaves. After a twist of fate, Evan agrees to assassinate his former master...with devastating results.

programme.title: Paradise
programme.desc: When three young women age and die within hours, a small town is turned upside down. How does Helen (Maxine Miller), a doctor's aging mother, play into these deaths? The answer to the puzzling mystery of fragile youth is soon to be revealed.

programme.title: The Light Brigade
programme.desc: On a desperate mission to survive, a young military cadet (Will Wheaton) learns the difference between heroic ideals and the bitter realities of war as he and his dying comrades prepare a strike against the aliens who may have condemn them to death.

programme.title: Out Of Body
programme.desc: What really happens during an out-of-body experience? Scientist Rebecca (Peri Gilpin) is so desperate to find out that she decides run an experiment on herself. But not everyone is happy of the lengths science will go to for empirical proof.

programme.title: The Sentence
programme.desc: Inventor Dr. Jack Henson (David Hyde Pierce) comes up with a "virtual prison" where criminals serve a life sentence in just a few, cost-efficient hours. When an innocent man's life is at stake, the doctor must submit himself to his own invention.

programme.title: Bits Of Love
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic underground bunker, a virtual reality world begins to turn on its inventor (Jon Tenney) after he becomes romantically involved with -- and then spurns -- the holographic interface (Natasha Henstridge) that controls the system.

programme.desc: The Las Vegas Raiders set the tone in the first half, when they shut out the Tennessee Titans. It was the first time Las Vegas has blanked an opponent in a half since the second half against New Orleans last Dec. 29.

programme.title: Buccaneers vs. Panthers - Week 16, 2025
programme.desc: Carolina Panthers quarterback Bryce Young throws 2 touchdowns, and the Panthers finally beat the Tampa Bay Buccaneers 23-20 to take over first place in NFC South.

programme.desc: Davis Mills leads an improbable 19-point comeback in the fourth quarter as the Texans rally to beat Trevor Lawrence and the Jaguars in a 36-29 upset victory.

programme.title: 2025: Lions vs. Bears - Week 18
programme.desc: Chicago rallies 16 points in the fourth quarter as the 'Cardiac Bears' attempt to take down the reigning NFC North champion Lions in the regular season finale of the 2025 season.

programme.title: 2025: Packers vs. Cowboys - Week 4
programme.desc: Micah Parsons returns to Dallas for the first time as a member of the Green Bay Packers as they duel against the Dallas Cowboys in a back-and-forth brawl that goes into overtime and ends in a 40-40 tie game.

programme.title: 2024: Commanders vs. Bengals - Week 3
programme.desc: Commanders rookie quarterback Jayden Daniels shined, going 21 of 23 with 254 yards and 3 touchdowns, leading the Commanders to a 38-33 victory over the Cincinnati Bengals. Joe Burrow's 324 yards weren't enough to avoid Cincinnati's 0-3 start.

programme.title: Bills vs. Patriots - Week 15, 2025
programme.desc: The Buffalo Bills rally from a 21-point deficit to beat the New England Patriots 35-31, to stay alive in the AFC East's playoff race.

programme.title: 2024: Cowboys vs. 49ers - Week 8
programme.desc: Brock Purdy bounced back from a shaky first half to lead three touchdown drives in the third quarter and the Niners narrowly avoided another fourth-quarter collapse with a late defensive stand that sealed a 30-24 victory Sunday night.

programme.title: 2025: Patriots vs. Broncos - AFC Championship
programme.desc: Condensed NFL football games.

programme.title: 2025: Rams vs. Seahawks - NFC Championship
programme.desc: Sam Darnold threw 3 touchdowns, the Seahawks' defense came up with a critical fourth-down stop, and Seattle advanced to Super Bowl LX, beating the Los Angeles Rams 31-27 in an electrifying NFC championship game.

programme.title: Chiefs vs. Bills - Week 9, 2025
programme.desc: Josh Allen moves to 5-1 against Patrick Mahomes during the regular season as the 2024 MVP outduels the Kansas City signal caller in a 28-21 victory that came down to the final drive.

programme.title: Seahawks vs. Patriots - Super Bowl LX
programme.desc: The Seahawks dominated the trenches on both sides of the ball as their defense dropped Drake Maye for six sacks and their offense rushed for 141 total yards behind Kenneth Walker III's MVP performance in a 29-13 Seattle victory.

programme.title: Bengals vs. Ravens - Week 10, 2024
programme.desc: Baltimore Ravens quarterback Lamar Jackson had 3 fourth-quarter touchdown passes, and the Ravens stopped the Cincinnati Bengals on a two-point conversion with 38 seconds remaining to hold them 35-34 on Thursday night.

programme.title: Eagles vs. Cowboys - Week 12, 2025
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott threw 2 touchdown passes, ran for the tying score and led the drive to Brandon Aubrey's 42-yard field goal as time expired as the Cowboys beat the Philadelphia Eagles 24-21 in a mistake-filled thriller Sunday.

programme.title: 2024: Bills vs. Rams - Week 14
programme.desc: Matthew Stafford passed for 320 yards and found wide receiver Puka Nacua for a 19-yard touchdown with 1:54 to play, and the Rams overcame Josh Allen's three touchdown passes and three touchdown runs to snap the Bills' seven-game winning streak.

programme.title: 2025: Packers vs. Bears - NFC Wild Card
programme.desc: It was the Bears' biggest postseason comeback in franchise history, which was capped by DJ Moore's 25-yard touchdown from Caleb Williams with just 1:48 to go in regulation.
